response.justification: Bogdan Szabo meets the minimum qualifications with 15+ years in software engineering and a BS in Computer Science. His AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq demonstrates relevant AI exposure, though it lacks the depth of AI-specific products or platforms. His entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective and strong engineering leadership (e.g., TDD, CI/CD) align with the role's strategic and innovation focus. However, the resume lacks explicit AI/ML expertise, PhD-level credentials, or clear evidence of building AI-powered products at scale.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on software engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded)
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, showing product development and leadership
Strong technical breadth with expertise in TypeScript, Docker, and performance optimization (e.g., low-latency apps) and leadership in engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited explicit AI/ML expertise or products built with AI (only tangential AI-agent infrastructure work)
No advanced degrees (MS/PhD) in AI or related fields, which are preferred
Most recent AI-related work (re:cinq) is early-stage and lacks demonstrated impact or scalability in AI products
